settings.title: Configure Account

validation.nodeUrlHttps: Node API URL must use HTTPS protocol (https://)
validation.sshUrlFormat: SSH URL must use SSH protocol (ssh://hostname:port)

welcome.title: Welcome to Aspera Browser

welcome.guidance: Click on the account icon in the top right corner to get started
welcome.selectAccount: Select an account to connect in 👤

messages.serverNotFound: Server not found. Please check the URL.
messages.connectionRefused: Connection refused. The server may be offline.
messages.accessDenied: Access denied. You don't have the necessary permissions.

messages.uploadSelectFolderSubtitle: Select the folder to upload in the dialog window
messages.uploadSelectFilesSubtitle: Select the files to upload in the dialog window
messages.webAgentNotAvailableSubtitle: Please install the application for desktop downloads.
messages.webAgentRequiredSubtitle: Please install Aspera Desktop to perform uploads.

messages.accountDeleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the account "{{name}}"?
